About Me

Hi I am Erzam Bayu ,
I am an individual who thrives on challenges and is passionate about continuous learning. With specialized expertise in networking and technology, I possess the ability to adapt to the latest technologies and am always ready to delve deeper into mastering them.

Student, SMK Perguruan Rakyat 2, Jakarta

2016 — 2020

I am a student at SMK Perguruan Rakyat 2 majoring in Computer and Network Engineering. At school, I delve into various technical skills such as network device installation and configuration, operating system management, basic programming, and network security. Additionally, I am involved in hands-on projects that allow me to apply my knowledge and skills in real-world scenarios. I am always eager to continue learning and developing my expertise in the field of information technology.

Student, Universitas Terbuka, Jakarta

2021 — present

I am pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Information Systems since 2021. I've gained skills in database management, system analysis, software development, and IT project management. Passionate about leveraging technology to solve problems and improve processes.

Game Promoter, PT Indofun Digital Technology, Jakarta

2023 — present

I am currently working at PT Indofun Games Technology as a game promoter. In this role, I am responsible for promoting and showcasing our diverse range of gaming products to potential customers. I engage with customers to demonstrate the features and benefits of our games, ensuring they have a clear understanding and interest in our offerings. Additionally, I collaborate closely with the sales and marketing teams to develop effective promotional strategies and campaigns to boost product visibility and sales.

IT technician, Cisco Indo, Tangerang

2021 — 2022

I previously worked at Cisco Indo as an IT technician. responsible for maintaining network devices and ensuring their optimal performance.

IT Network, STTJ, Jakarta

2018 — 2020

I previously worked at STTJ University as an IT technician. responsible for maintaining network devices and ensuring the server rooms operated smoothly.
